asciichat_error_t yt_dlp_extract_stream_url (const char *
  url, const char * yt_dlp_options, char * output_url, size_t output_size)


#include
  <include/ascii-chat/media/yt_dlp.h>


Extract stream URL using yt-dlp with optional parameters. Calls
    yt-dlp subprocess with --dump-json to extract direct stream URL. Results are
    cached for 30 seconds.




Parameters


url Input URL (YouTube, Twitch, direct streams,
  etc.)


yt_dlp_options Arbitrary yt-dlp options string e.g.,
  "--cookies-from-browser=chrome --no-warnings" Pass NULL or
  "" for no extra options


output_url Output buffer for extracted stream URL


output_size Size of output buffer (recommend 8192+ bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Note


On failure, logs error context via log_error()



Results are cached to avoid redundant yt-dlp calls




Thread-safe: Uses centralized cache with proper locking




Definition at line 152 of file yt_dlp.c.


153                                                                 {
154   if (!url || !output_url || output_size < 256) {
155     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters for yt-dlp URL extraction");
156     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
157   }
158 
159   // Check if yt-dlp is available
160   if (!yt_dlp_is_available()) {
161     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "yt-dlp is not installed. Please install it with: "
162                                             "pip install yt-dlp (or: brew install yt-dlp on macOS)");
163     return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
164   }
165 
166   // Check if we have a cached extraction for this URL+options combination
167   char cached_url[8192] = {0};
168   if (yt_dlp_cache_get(url, yt_dlp_options, cached_url, sizeof(cached_url))) {
169     if (cached_url[0] != '\0') {
170       // Cached success - return the URL
171       SAFE_STRNCPY(output_url, cached_url, output_size - 1);
172       output_url[output_size - 1] = '\0';
173       return ASCIICHAT_OK;
174     } else {
175       // Cached failure - return error without logging again
176       return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
177     }
178   }
179 
180   // Build yt-dlp command
181   char command[4096];
182   const char *opts = yt_dlp_options ? yt_dlp_options : "";
183 
184   int cmd_ret;
185   if (opts[0] != '\0') {
186     // User provided custom options
187     cmd_ret = safe_snprintf(command, sizeof(command),
188                             "yt-dlp --quiet --no-warnings "
189                             "--user-agent 'Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7) "
190                             "AppleWebKit/537.36' "
191                             "%s "
192                             "-f 'b' -O '%%(url)s' '%s' 2>&1",
193                             opts, url);
194   } else {
195     // No custom options, use default
196     cmd_ret = safe_snprintf(command, sizeof(command),
197                             "yt-dlp --quiet --no-warnings "
198                             "--user-agent 'Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7) "
199                             "AppleWebKit/537.36' "
200                             "-f 'b' -O '%%(url)s' '%s' 2>&1",
201                             url);
202   }
203 
204   if (cmd_ret < 0 || cmd_ret >= (int)sizeof(command)) {
205     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "URL or yt-dlp options too long");
206     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
207   }
208 
209   log_debug("Executing yt-dlp: %s", command);
210 
211   // Execute yt-dlp and capture output
212   FILE *pipe = NULL;
213   if (platform_popen("yt_dlp_extract", command, "r", &pipe) != ASCIICHAT_OK || !pipe) {
214     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "Failed to execute yt-dlp subprocess");
215     return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
216   }
217 
218   // Read output looking for stream URL (should be last line starting with http)
219   char url_buffer[8192] = {0};
220   char full_output[16384] = {0};
221   size_t ytdlp_output_len = 0;
222   size_t url_size = 0;
223   int c;
224 
225   while ((c = fgetc(pipe)) != EOF && ytdlp_output_len < sizeof(full_output) - 1) {
226     full_output[ytdlp_output_len++] = (char)c;
227 
228     // Track current line - looking for http:// or https:// stream URL
229     if ((url_size == 0 && c == 'h') || (url_size > 0 && c != '\n' && url_size < sizeof(url_buffer) - 1)) {
230       url_buffer[url_size++] = (char)c;
231     } else if (c == '\n') {
232       if (url_size > 0) {
233         url_buffer[url_size] = '\0';
234         if (url_is_valid(url_buffer)) {
235           break; // Found valid URL
236         }
237       }
238       url_size = 0; // Reset for next line
239     }
240   }
241   full_output[ytdlp_output_len] = '\0';
242   url_buffer[url_size] = '\0';
243 
244   int pclose_ret = (platform_pclose(&pipe) == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : -1;
245   if (pclose_ret != 0) {
246     yt_dlp_cache_set(url, yt_dlp_options, NULL); // Cache failure
247 
248     log_debug("yt-dlp exited with code %d", pclose_ret);
249     if (ytdlp_output_len > 0) {
250       log_error("yt-dlp output:\n%s", full_output);
251       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "yt-dlp failed to extract stream: %s", full_output);
252     } else {
253       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "yt-dlp failed to extract stream");
254     }
255     return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
256   }
257 
258   if (url_size == 0 || (url_size == 2 && strncmp(url_buffer, "NA", 2) == 0)) {
259     yt_dlp_cache_set(url, yt_dlp_options, NULL);
260     log_error("yt-dlp returned empty output for URL: %s", url);
261     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "yt-dlp returned no playable formats");
262     return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
263   }
264 
265   if (url_buffer[0] != 'h' || strncmp(url_buffer, "http", 4) != 0) {
266     yt_dlp_cache_set(url, yt_dlp_options, NULL);
267     log_error("Invalid URL from yt-dlp: %s (full output: %s)", url_buffer, full_output);
268     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, "yt-dlp returned invalid URL");
269     return ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED;
270   }
271 
272   if (url_size >= output_size) {
273     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Stream URL too long for output buffer (%zu bytes, max %zu)", url_size, output_size);
274     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
275   }
276 
277   SAFE_STRNCPY(output_url, url_buffer, output_size - 1);
278   output_url[output_size - 1] = '\0';
279 
280   // Cache successful result
281   yt_dlp_cache_set(url, yt_dlp_options, output_url);
282 
283   log_debug("yt-dlp successfully extracted stream URL (%zu bytes)", url_size);
284   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
285 }

    ERROR_YOUTUBE_EXTRACT_FAILED, log_debug, log_error,
    platform_pclose(), platform_popen(), safe_snprintf(),
    SAFE_STRNCPY, SET_ERRNO, url_is_valid(), and
    yt_dlp_is_available().






bool yt_dlp_is_available (void )


#include
  <include/ascii-chat/media/yt_dlp.h>


Check if yt-dlp is installed and accessible. Runs yt-dlp --version
    to verify yt-dlp is available in PATH.




Returns


true if yt-dlp --version succeeds, false otherwise


Note


Thread-safe: No static state
